name: @ctrl/claude-shim
description: OpenAI-compatible HTTP shim that wraps the local `claude` CLI. Used by Irisy PWA via Tauri invoke; can plug into any OpenAI-shape client (Hermes custom_providers etc).

scripts.test:chat: curl -sN -X POST http://localhost:8787/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5","stream":true,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"一句话说你是谁"}]}'
scripts.test:nonstream: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"一句话说你是谁"}]}' | jq .
